{{Infobox character
| name = Forest Demon
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] asks the hooded man if he is the [[Forest Demon]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c1">''House of Blades'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Demon]] of the forest has tangled, wiry white hair.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c5">''House of Blades'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Demon]] of the forest possesses a [[sword]] with a blade six or seven feet long.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c5" />}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Forest Demon]] is an old legend that may apply to [[Indirial]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
